task_description: Build a static Next.js App Router web application serving as a Dev Snippet & Content Hub with portfolio page, snippet vault with search/filter, copy-to-clipboard, and dark mode toggle. Data sourced from local TypeScript file. All pages statically generated.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all 9 pages statically generated (/, /_not-found, /snippets, 4x /snippets/[id]). npm run lint passes clean. Semantic review v2 APPROVED after v1 issues were fixed.
